utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Now I check the final plan. (1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance, with costs (monthly_cost field), so fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance details but missing explicit 'costs'—no monthly or annual cost field is shown, so incomplete. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance details but no costs, so incomplete. (4) additional_services: includes enhancement service with schedule but no cost, so incomplete. (5) total_budget: includes full monthly/annual cost breakdown, so fully specified. Thus, out of 5 items, 2 are fully specified (health_coverage and total_budget).
